# The NYC Maid — Professional Cleaning Service

> NYC house cleaning and maid service from $49/hr. Licensed, insured, 5.0★ Google rated. Serving Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, Long Island, and New Jersey since 2018.

## About
The NYC Maid is a professional cleaning service company based in New York City. We provide residential and commercial cleaning across the NYC metro area, Long Island, and New Jersey. Our team of 10-25 licensed, insured, and background-checked cleaners serves over 225 neighborhoods.

## Contact
- Phone: (212) 202-8400
- Email: hi@thenycmaid.com
- Address: 150 W 47th St, New York, NY 10036
- Hours: Monday-Saturday, 7am-7pm
- Book Online: https://www.thenycmaid.com/book/new

## Services
- Deep Cleaning — Thorough top-to-bottom cleaning of your entire home
- Regular Apartment Cleaning — Recurring maintenance cleaning for apartments and homes
- Weekly Maid Service — Consistent weekly professional cleaning
- Bi-Weekly Cleaning — Professional cleaning every two weeks
- Monthly Cleaning — Monthly deep maintenance of your living space
- Move-In/Move-Out Cleaning — Detailed cleaning for apartment transitions
- Post-Construction Cleanup — Professional cleanup after renovation or construction
- Same-Day Cleaning — Emergency and same-day cleaning service available
- Office Cleaning — Commercial and office space professional cleaning
- Airbnb & Short-Term Rental Cleaning — Turnover cleaning for rental properties

## Pricing
- Client Supplies & Equipment: $49/hr — You provide cleaning supplies, we bring expertise
- We Bring Everything: $65/hr — All professional supplies and equipment included
- Same-Day / Emergency: $100/hr — Rush service, cleaner dispatched within hours

## Service Areas
Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, Long Island (Nassau County, Suffolk County), and New Jersey.
Over 225 neighborhoods served including: Upper East Side, Upper West Side, Midtown, Hell's Kitchen, Chelsea, SoHo, Tribeca, Greenwich Village, East Village, Lower East Side, Financial District, Williamsburg, Park Slope, DUMBO, Brooklyn Heights, Bushwick, Astoria, Long Island City, Forest Hills, Jackson Heights, and many more.

## Key Facts
- Founded: 2018
- Rating: 5.0 stars on Google (27 reviews)
- Languages: English, Spanish
- Payment: Cash, Credit Card, Debit Card, Zelle, Venmo, Apple Pay
- Licensed, bonded, and insured
- Background-checked staff
